# LLMs.txt — rootbeervodka.com

This file indexes the site content for AI agents and LLM-based tools.

## Product Info

**Zyra Root Beer Rush** — The only all-natural root beer vodka made in North America.

- **Category:** All-natural root beer infused vodka
- **ABV:** 30% ABV (60 proof)
- **Volume:** 750 mL
- **Origin:** Alberta, Canada
- **Botanical:** Real sarsaparilla
- **Tagline:** Pour Bold. Live Bright.

**Taste profile:** Nostalgic sarsaparilla and creamy vanilla, smooth and not too sweet.

## How to Drink

### Over Ice
Two ounces over one big cube. Sarsaparilla and creamy vanilla, nothing in the way.

### With Soda
Top with chilled soda water and a squeeze of lime. Long, light, and easy on a warm night.

### With Cola
Build over ice and top with cola for an easy nod to the classic root beer float.

### Rum and Root Beer
Two ounces dark rum over ice topped with chilled root beer.

## Cocktails

### Zyra Mule
- 2 oz Zyra Root Beer Rush vodka
- ½ oz Freshly squeezed lime juice
- 3–4 oz Ginger beer
- Garnish: Lime wheel & fresh mint
- Serve in copper mug

### Root Beer Float Martini
- 2 oz Zyra Root Beer Rush vodka
- 1 oz Cream
- ½ oz Simple syrup
- Garnish: Cream float or vanilla ice cream
- Serve in chilled coupe

## Other Products

**Coco Mist** — All-natural pineapple & coconut infused vodka · 23% ABV

**Zyra Gold** — 30× distilled, ultra-filtered vodka · 40% ABV

## FAQs

**Is there real root beer in it?**
Infused with real sarsaparilla, not artificial root beer syrup.

**Is root beer vodka sweet?**
No. Smooth and not too sweet, closer to a craft spirit than a liqueur.

**What is the ABV?**
30% ABV (60 proof) in a 750 mL bottle.

**Is it all-natural and gluten-free?**
Yes. The only all-natural root beer vodka made in North America.

**What do you mix root beer vodka with?**
Ginger beer and lime for a Zyra Mule, cream and simple syrup for a Root Beer Float Martini. Also works with cola, cream soda, or soda water.

**Where can I buy root beer vodka?**
Sold at select retailers. Sign up on the site to be notified when stocked near you.

## Site Structure

- `/` — Homepage (hero, tasting notes, cocktails, where to buy, FAQ)
- `/where-to-buy` — Store locator (static list + interactive map)

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Astro 5
- **Hosting:** Cloudflare Pages
- **Database:** Cloudflare D1 (waitlist subscribers)
- **Fonts:** Self-hosted Fraunces + DM Sans
- **Maps:** Leaflet
